data.body:
## Description

**What**: Modify sprint-list-epics.sh to query for open P0 bugs and display them prominently above the epic list. This ensures eval regressions (and any other P0 bugs) are visible before developers select work.

**Why**: A P0 bug created by the daily CI is useless if no one sees it. Surfacing P0 bugs in the sprint epic listing — the entry point for all sprint work — guarantees developers encounter regressions before starting new features.

**Scope**:
- IN: P0 bug query in sprint-list-epics.sh, display formatting (ticket ID, title, priority) above epic list
- OUT: P0 ticket creation logic (separate story), eval framework itself

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, sprint-list-epics.sh displays any open P0 bugs (all types, not just eval regression) above the epic list when any exist, with ticket ID, title, and priority
  ← Satisfies: "sprint-list-epics.sh queries for open P0 bugs and displays them above the epic list"
- Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Process] sprint-list-epics.sh is in plugins/dso/scripts/ — a protected safeguard path per CLAUDE.md rule 20; changes require user approval
